hooks.command: echo '⚠ SESSION-CLOSE — run /done before ending: append docs/ops/session-log.md (accomplished / decisions / blockers / next), update docs/PROGRAM-BOARD.md, and commit the docs PR. Session memory is NOT durable until committed. New doc? Check docs/INDEX.md for prior art first, and born-link it (an INDEX line + markdown links to related docs).'
